title: NemexLib
description: A library mod for Minecraft and Thaumcraft 4 Mod in 1.7.10. Coding Addons has never been easier than this ! Used for most of my mods.
body:
# A Library mod, mostly used for Thaumcraft 4 API
You will here a library mod, containing a lot of utility code and stuff concerning mostly Thaumcraft 4.

This mod needs latest version Thaumcraft 4 to be able to work/load.

## Here is a non-exhaustive list of what you'll found inside :
- Easier use of Thaumcraft 4 API
- "Ready-To-Extend" code for **Logger**, **Configuration**, **Integrations** and **OreDict**
- Utility classes for finding modded **Items** & **Blocks** in the forge registry
- Utility code for making **Deep Copies** of ItemStacks, with editable stackSize/amount
- A new API for Thaumcraft, making easier to add **Tabs**, edit **Research** and **Research Pages**
- A class named **AResearch**, containing a lot of stuff for easier **Research creation**
- A class named **Aspects**, allowing for easier **AspectList creation**
- Classes **JarMaker** & **EnchantedBookMaker**, helping for much easier dealing with NBT tags
- Full code for **Adding, Finding & Removing recipes** for Vanilla and Thaumcraft 4
  - Supported recipes : **IRecipe**, **OreDict**, **Arcane**, **Crucible** and **Infusion** 
- A collection of new useful **exceptions** mostly related to Thaumcraft stuff
- Multiple useful in-game chat commands (/nemexlib help)
 - **Find research from recipes** : The search will be done from the recipe output, compared to the item typed in the command
  - **Get held item NBT** : Will return the NBT tags associated with the held in the hand of the player
  - Compatible with **auto-completion** for all fields + error/typos handling with feedback messages

## Licence :
- You can use the mod to make mods & addons, redistribute and monetize these products.
- You are free to give any licence you want to your newborn mod or addon.
- You can use this mod in any modpack, redistribute and monetise the modpack containing this library mod.
- You must give credit and a link back to this mod when using it for your mods, addons or modpacks.
- You are not allowed to redistribute any derivated/edited version of this library mod, unless you got an explicit permission by the mod owner.

If you want any feature added to this library mod, please tell me in comments or on GitHub issues tracker !

# End of Modrinth support !
- The newest versions of the mod will only be available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thenemex/projects)
- These mods are essentially made for my modpack [**Thaumic Industries 2 - Expert**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumic-industries-2-expert), but I try my best to bring new features and config tweaks for everyone to enjoy !
